name: chrX_Xq26_2_GPC3_SD
description: Xq26.2 region containing GPC3 (glypican 3, Simpson-Golabi-Behmel syndrome). GPC3 spans ~500 kb and harbors intronic SDs; nearby BCORL1 (paralog of BCOR on Xp11.4) creates a long-range paralogy. Recurrent intragenic GPC3 deletions cause SGBS.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic GPC3 SDs and LINE-rich regions; BCORL1 paralog of BCOR (Xp11.4) at same band.
